_comment: Multi-edge (M4) home+VPS double-write demo. Both edges use the Traefik file provider so live state PERSISTS across separate crenel invocations (the in-process fake Caddy admin API resets every run, so a fake-Caddy edge can't show cross-command persistence — heterogeneous Caddy+Traefik double-write is proven in internal/core/multiedge_test.go). grafana is fronted by BOTH edges; photos only home; vault only vps.
